recommendedFlows.name: Company Profile Standard Flow
recommendedFlows.description: Balanced flow for a normal generated deck.

recommendedFlows.name: Company Profile Deep Dive Flow
recommendedFlows.description: Expanded flow for research-heavy or detailed decks.

charting.slideHtmlPolicy: Embed returned SVG inline. Do not include chart scripts, remote assets, canvas runtime, or CDN URLs in slide HTML.

icons.policy: Use create_icon_visual for icon groups. Embed returned HTML/SVG inline. Do not use emoji, generic stars, crude custom icons, remote icon fonts, CDN icon scripts, or browser-side icon packages in slide HTML.

imageRules.policy: Use uploaded or generated assets resolved by the backend. Do not embed remote URLs in slide HTML.

description: A premium corporate profile system for company profile, corporate intro, services deck, capabilities deck, team presentation.

compatibility.migrationPolicy: preserve generated deck artifacts; use template version only for new generations

typography.policy: Use these local server-renderable stacks. Do not use remote font imports or CDN font URLs in preview or generated slide HTML.
